stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Consider a flight operating from Zone D and expected to end in Zone A, planned for the afternoon of 26th July 2017, flying at 3 000 ft AMSL. What conditions can you expect at cruising altitude?

options.a: Out of clouds throughout the flight.
options.b: Largely free of clouds, moderate turbulence along route.
options.d: Mainly in clouds, moderate turbulence expected within clouds.
